name: EchoForge
description_short: Identity and proof layer on Cardano. Anchor certificates and file hashes on-chain for a flat $1 in ADA, with a tiered wallet identity layer (EchoID) surfaced through EchoDash.
description_long: EchoForge is a B2B2C identity and proof layer on Cardano, built around one principle: keep it simple. Its live products let anyone prove things on-chain for a flat $1 in ADA. EchoCert anchors certificates and credentials so they can be independently verified on-chain. EchoUploader anchors a file's SHA-256 hash as a permanent proof of existence; the file itself never leaves the user's device. EchoID, a wallet-based identity and tiering layer, has its backend live (echoid.echoforgellc.tech); it has no standalone public frontend and is currently rendered through EchoDash and the ForgeCard kiosk route. All USD prices settle in ADA via an on-chain oracle.

products.name: EchoCert
products.description: Anchors certificates and credentials on Cardano for independent on-chain verification. $1 per certificate in ADA.

products.name: EchoUploader
products.description: Creates a permanent on-chain proof of existence for any file by anchoring its SHA-256 hash. $1 per anchor in ADA; the file never leaves the user's device.

products.name: EchoID
products.description: Wallet-based identity and tiering layer for the EchoForge ecosystem. Backend is live; has no standalone public frontend and is currently rendered through EchoDash and the ForgeCard kiosk route.

products.name: EchoDash
products.description: Identity aggregator for the EchoForge ecosystem, built on the EchoID backend. Supports both personal and organization modes.

products.name: ForgeCard
products.description: NFC hardware project in development. Tapping a ForgeCard displays the holder's EchoID tier information on-screen.

policy.description: Minting policy for EchoCert on-chain certificate anchoring, backed by the documint.documint validator. Each token name equals SHA-256(name | date | issuer). $1 ADA per issuance.

scripts.description: (Plutus v3, Aiken v1.1.21). Never deployed to mainnet or preprod; source preserved in credential/legacy/ for reference.

DocuMint minting validator (Plutus v3, Aiken v1.1.21) — the active production validator for EchoCert. The deployed EchoCert minting policy runs this validator's logic, not echocert.echocert. Issues and revokes on-chain credential certificates as Cardano native tokens.
